name: arrowgram
description: Codex workflows for file-backed Arrowgram diagrams and papers.

interface.shortDescription: Create and edit Arrowgram papers and diagrams.
interface.longDescription: Arrowgram helps Codex initialize, edit, validate, preview, snapshot, and build file-backed Arrowgram workspaces using @hotdocx/arrowgram-agent.
defaultPrompt: Create an Arrowgram paper workspace here.
Validate and build this Arrowgram project.
